title: lindernia andringitrae
intro: Lindernia andringitrae, also known as Madagascar Lindernia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Linderniaceae. It is a type of annual or perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used in Madagascar to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, wounds, and skin infections, providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved wound healing. Lindernia andringitrae can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts may also be used in pharmaceutical applications.
